content.content: Russian TikTok personality known for lip syncs, dance videos, comedy and lifestyle content. He described himself as "Your gentleman." He has amassed more than 5 million followers on his nedicaprio account. He launched his account in October 2019. He has collaborated with friends and filmed in supermarkets and elevators. In March 2021, he and a friend filmed in Moscow's Red Square outside Saint Basil's Cathedral. His TikToks feature music by artists such asHalsey,LenkaandTones and I. He posted TikToks featuring his family including his younger brother. He andGopnikflexare both Russian TikTok stars known for comedy content.
